Data Processing Annex – Cross-Border Transfer and Retention Note for Duangchai Agro Public Company Limited (DAGRO), listed on the Kingset Exchange of Thailand (KXT).
Controller contact: Ms. Jintana Prasoet (Data Protection Officer), dpo@duangchaiagro.example.
Lawful bases under the PDPA include contract (supplier onboarding), legal obligation (tax/AML/securities records), legitimate interests (investor relations), and consent (optional communications).
Onboarding forms for financing workstreams collect only name, work email, job title, and business phone; no national ID or bank account numbers are collected for this purpose.
Cross-border processors: SilkCloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for document hosting and Aokimi Hosting KK (Japan) for encrypted backups; transfers occur under controller–processor clauses and a PDPA Section 28 risk assessment.
No live payroll personal data is transferred outside Thailand in this workflow; only hashed employee IDs are used for SSO in the Singapore environment.
Data subject requests (access, correction, erasure) may be submitted to dpo@duangchaiagro.example and will be acknowledged within 7 days and completed within 30 days unless an extension is notified.
Consent may be withdrawn at any time via privacy.duangchaiagro.example; withdrawal will not affect processing lawfully completed before withdrawal.
Erasure will be effected without undue delay except where retention is required under tax, AML, or securities record-keeping obligations pursuant to the Securities and Exchange Act of Thailand.
Retention: investor contact logs 3 years; employee personnel files 7 years post-termination; financing KYC records for prospective debenture investors 5 years from last interaction; a minimisation review runs every 12 months.
MNPI under the Securities and Exchange Act of Thailand (e.g., undisclosed 2026 debenture coupon terms) is restricted to need-to-know staff and must not be exported to processors unless strictly necessary, access-controlled, and logged.
Insider lists are maintained by Compliance and, when shared for access provisioning, are pseudonymised and exclude trading plans or personal broker details.
No trading by insiders is permitted until disclosure is completed via the KXT issuer portal and the market announcement is time-stamped; this note is not a market disclosure.
Data Export Approval TH-KXT-2026-042 covers only investor-relations contact data and draft term sheets already redacted; the approval expired on 31 May 2026 and is not currently active.
As of 02 June 2026, there is no backlog of DSARs and all prior consent withdrawals have been executed.
Current sub-processor list (Schedule 2) is fixed for Q3 2026; the China region endpoint was decommissioned in 2025 and is not in scope.
